feed.title: Bhavik Kanejiya
feed.subtitle: Penetration Tester, VAPT, Cyber Security Analyst, bug hunter, Cloud Security

entry.title: Let’s do a peek inside the admin dashboard - Abuse API endpoint

link.title: Let’s do a peek inside the admin dashboard - Abuse API endpoint

entry.summary:
There is broken access control in the API which helps an employee to become the admin of a workspace but with limited permissions.
Let’s do peek inside admin dashboard: Abuse API endpoint Header
Application introduction
It’s a productivity app that has over 2 million+ users and is used by business to track employee project time and expenses.
Key Features
There are many features, but these...
